creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
# pgrep -ilf opensearch
# service opensearch onestart
Starting opensearch.
# WARNING: A terminally deprecated method in java.lang.System has been called
... blah blah 

# service opensearch status
opensearch is not running.

# sockstat -46l |grep java
opensearch java     26703 545 tcp4   127.0.0.1:9300        *:*
opensearch java     26703 548 tcp4   127.0.0.1:9200        *:*

# service opensearch onestop
opensearch not running? (check /var/run/opensearch/opensearch.pid).
# cat /var/run/opensearch/opensearch.pid
26703
